summary: Solid audience recording of a classic cold‑night set; sound is decent but benefits from Dolby playback.
review: The reviewer notes that this tape was captured with a Sony TCD‑5M cassette deck and AKG microphones, describing the resulting audio as "nice" and recommending Dolby decoding for best results. They also call the show a "classic" set despite the very cold weather, indicating overall satisfaction with both performance and recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderately detailed review (4 stars) praising both the show and the tape‑deck capture, leading to a solid but not exceptional overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Captured on Sony TCD‑5M cassette deck with AKG-CK61 mics; reviewer suggests playback with Dolby on for optimal clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a classic set despite very cold conditions; no specific issues mentioned.
